title: 10 best herbal creams for migraine
description: Artemisia absinthium, also known as wormwood, creams helps with migraine because of its unique ability to reduce inflammation and relax tense muscles. The active compounds in wormwood, such as thujone and borneol, have been shown to have analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to alleviate migraine pain. Additionally, wormwood creams can also help to regulate the body's response to pain and reduce the frequency and severity of migraine episodes, providing relief to those...
